underlying_goal: Check GitLab CI/CD pipeline status and get comprehensive summaries with root cause analysis, testing different execution modes of a custom skill
friction_detail: Claude repeatedly tried to use shell tools (curl/bash) when the No-Exec Mode skill explicitly forbade them, and WebFetch couldn't reach internal hosts, requiring multiple retries and mode switches.
brief_summary: User tested a GitLab pipeline status skill across multiple invocations and execution modes; Claude eventually produced pipeline summaries but struggled with the No-Exec Mode constraints, repeatedly needing correction about tool usage restrictions.
